0cfDHqhfgS.fact: Claude-specific code must live in lore/claude/**/* files. Do not introduce Claude references elsewhere.

2nJ8qK4rPs.fact: bin/manage_facts must remain slim - only dispatch to library functions, never implement core logic

3Xy2Rce9PU.fact: When regex patterns in '.lore.json' aren't working, first check JSON validity - a single bad escape breaks all facts in that file.

4pqgUQ9hVf.fact: Don't use underscore-prefixed import aliases to avoid name collisions

4vR7sT1wHc.fact: Edit must preserve fact ID when relocating via delete+create (identity is stable across relocation)

5dW6hL9vBn.fact: Empty '.lore.json' files must be deleted automatically when last fact is removed (keep repository clean)

9bX3cY5zFm.fact: {{filepath}}: Skip patterns must be validated for scope at creation and edit time (before relativization) to warn of orphaned exclusions

AeJ1d9FDcV.fact: bin/ wrappers and [project.scripts] in pyproject.toml register the same four entry points. Keep in sync.

FTjtMYvgHH.fact: After bumping the version here, update the version pin in lore-claude: edit LORE_VERSION, bump plugin.json and marketplace.json versions, then push. See lore-claude/RELEASING.md.

HG3F0cVxEW.fact: Prefer triple-quoted strings or module-level constants over implicit string concatenation for multiline text

ICZss22RQP.fact: Prefix strings (g:…, r:…) are a serialization detail owned by store/. Code here should work with typed Fact/MatcherSet fields instead.

Kb2CxQd0q0.fact: Add a blank line before the first item of every list

KdqpRCKdpQ.fact: Prefer one-liner method signatures. Keep `def name(...)...:` on a single line even when long

MQhW6NJigm.fact: from ... import must not use ()-brackets for a single imported item. Long lines are fine

cmPSw1cDRE.fact: Never import and use Path, prefer 'os' functions instead

e7CcEhT2UW.fact: We don't allow nested function definitions. Local helper/organizational methods should start with "_"

ejn7IjQtBy.fact: "_"-prefixed helpers should be turned to separate functions if they are clearly reusable or deserve a dedicated unit test

j3HEX0LABD.fact: {{filepath}} stores per-directory-tree fact definitions with glob-based matchers

j9eMq0lynU.fact: Never edit '.lore.json' files directly - use lore MCP tools or 'lore' command instead.

qVgRJ2WPPG.fact: All MCP-specific code should reside in lore/mcp/**/*

z03aNxcFBG.fact: We never import _-helpers from other files. Consider extracting a shared utility function
